game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ナイト・アンド・ドラゴン２：狂乱の時代 (Knight and Dragon 2: Age of Madness):** Players lead a party of up to six adventurers (four active, two reserve) through a hack-and-slash RPG, navigating menus and managing equipment via taps. Combat unfolds in real-time, with party members automatically engaging enemies, while players intervene by activating character-specific skills or spells via on-screen buttons with cooldowns. Defeated enemies drop randomized loot with varying rarity tiers, which players collect and equip using an "auto high-level item equip" feature, to enhance character stats and unlock new "equip skills." Progression is driven by completing a story with double the mission volume of its predecessor, unlocking "higher classes" for characters, and earning experience points for leveling. An innovative "Party Dispatch" system allows reserve members to passively level up and farm items in the background, even when the app is closed, with an "infinite dungeon" providing endless post-game content.
game_info.description: Lead a party of four active heroes through a hack-and-slash RPG adventure! Your heroes automatically attack nearby enemies in real-time combat. Activate powerful character skills using number keys (1-4) to turn the tide of battle. Defeat enemies to collect randomized loot and gain experience. Equipment is automatically equipped to boost your stats. Progress through multiple story missions, unlock higher classes for your heroes, and survive the infinite dungeon for endless challenges!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move party leader (all party members follow)
Space: Dash forward quickly
Z: Use special party-wide ability (when charged)
1-4: Activate hero-specific skills (with cooldowns)
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and combat mechanics. Verify that the player can navigate the battlefield, party members follow correctly, and combat initiates properly when near enemies.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the battlefield in patterns, approach enemies to trigger combat, and verify party cohesion. Test dash ability and ensure collision detection works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves with arrow keys, party follows in formation, enemies are engaged in combat, and no positioning errors occur. Test passes when basic mechanics function smoothly for 500 frames.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves with arrow keys, party follows in formation, enemies are engaged in combat, and no positioning errors occur. Test passes when basic mechanics function smoothly for 500 frames.

TEST_2.test_description: Test winning condition by completing missions efficiently. This validates the full gameplay loop from combat to loot collection to mission completion.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively pursue enemies, use skills strategically when off cooldown, collect all loot drops, and progress through missions. Optimize movement to minimize time between enemy encounters.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all story missions and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. Verify experience gain, loot collection, level progression, and final victory screen display correctly.

TEST_3.test_description: Test skill activation system and cooldown management. Verify all hero skills can be triggered and function correctly with proper cooldown tracking.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Systematically activate each hero skill (keys 1-4) in sequence, wait for cooldowns, and repeat. Ensure skills have visual feedback and affect gameplay appropriately.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All skills activate correctly, cooldowns prevent rapid reuse, visual indicators show skill status, and skills produce intended combat effects. Test runs for 800 frames testing all skills multiple times.
